[07:15:42 INF] ABP CLI 9.3.6-dev
[07:15:42 INF] 
Usage:

    labp <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > create: Generate a new solution based on the customed ABP startup templates.
    > generate-proxy: Generates client service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.
    > generate-view: Generate the view code from the http api proxy.

To get a detailed help for a command:

    labp help <command>

[07:15:42 INF] 
Usage:

    labp <command> <target> [options]

Command List:

    > create: Generate a new solution based on the customed ABP startup templates.
    > generate-proxy: Generates client service proxies and DTOs to consume HTTP APIs.
    > generate-view: Generate the view code from the http api proxy.

result.stdout:
[07:15:43 INF] ABP CLI 9.3.6-dev
[07:15:43 WRN] Project name is missing!


Usage:

  labp create <project-name> [options]

Options:

-pk|--package <package-name>               (default: app)
-t|--template <template-name>               (default: lam), optional:lam、laa
-d|--database-provider <database-provider>  (if supported by the template)
-o|--output-folder <output-folder>          (default: current folder)
-v|--version <version>                      (default: latest version)
-csf|--create-solution-folder               (default: true)
-cs|--connection-string <connection-string> (your database connection string)
--dbms <database-management-system>         (your database management system)
--no-random-port                            (Use template's default ports)

Examples:

  labp create Acme.BookStore
  labp create Acme.BookStore -pk Com
  labp create Acme.BookStore -d mongodb
  labp create Acme.BookStore -d mongodb -o d:\my-project
  labp create Acme.BookStore -ts "D:\localTemplate\abp"
  labp create Acme.BookStore -csf false
  labp create Acme.BookStore --local-framework-ref --abp-path "D:\github\abp"
  labp create Acme.BookStore --dbms mysql
  labp create Acme.BookStore --connection-string "Server=myServerName\myInstanceName;Database=myDatabase;User Id=myUsername;Password=myPassword"
